buttons.primary: bg-[#5DA9A4] text-white hover:bg-[#4A8F8A] rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-[#8D6E63] text-white hover:bg-[#795C52] rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#5DA9A4] text-[#5DA9A4] hover:bg-[#5DA9A4]/10 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm p-6
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm p-6 hover:shadow-md hover:border-[#5DA9A4]/30 transition-all cursor-pointer
cards.stat: bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-100 p-6 flex flex-col gap-2

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#5DA9A4] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

admin_dashboard.structure: Sidebar Navigation (Left) + Top Header + Main Content Area

client_menu.structure: Sticky Header (Category Nav) + Scrollable Menu List + Sticky Bottom Cart
client_menu.grid: Masonry or List View (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4)
client_menu.item_card: Image Top/Left + Title + Description + Price + Add Button

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Mint & Brown' theme using the specified hex codes in tailwind.config.js.
Use 'Manrope' for all headings to give a modern, friendly feel.
For the Admin Dashboard, use a Sidebar layout. For the Client Menu, use a Mobile-First layout.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds; stick to solid colors or subtle textures.
Ensure high contrast for text readability, especially on the mint background.
The 'Client Menu' must be accessible without login (Guest Mode).
Implement 'Theme Switching' capability in the Admin Settings (Light/Dark/System), but default to the Mint/Brown Light theme.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs; use generous spacing and unique layouts.
Dark colors should be used independently, not in gradients.
Create depth with z-index and shadows, not just borders.
No 'transition: all'; animate specific properties only.
Micro-animations for all interactions (hover, click, focus).
